constraints.description: Implement every destination and meaningful state shown by KnowMe Standalone and the approved screenshot set; no placeholder or missing routes.
Use no visible lines, borders, divider rules, or layout shadows; distinguish adjacent regions only with background-color changes.

validation.validation_method: source audit plus rendered screenshot inspection

constraints.description: Match the KnowMe palette, monogram/wordmark, typography hierarchy, density, and restrained ember/cyan semantics in light and dark themes.

validation.validation_method: token audit and side-by-side screenshot review

constraints.description: Provide the accepted desktop rail, phone bottom navigation, adaptive conversation library, branded titlebar, and safe-area behavior.
Mount Shadcn UI for general primitives and Assistant UI for the real thread/composer/thread-list boundary; do not use raw replacement controls.

Use Prometheus Entity Management 3.x for conversation entities, Zustand for transient state, PGlite on web, and pglite-oxide through Rust on Tauri; support multiple threads, search, drafts, archive, and replay.

validation.validation_method: refresh/relaunch persistence and public entity workflow

constraints.description: Render the exhaustive ContentBlock/AG-UI stream including thinking, citations, memory, tools, skills, artifacts, Markdown, Mermaid, sanitized SVG, images, and media with safe fallbacks.

validation.validation_method: typed exhaustiveness and representative live/snapshot states

constraints.description: A first-run user can chat without cloud credentials using a supported local model on Tauri, web, and Flutter; cloud Liter-LLM BYOK remains optional.

validation.validation_method: real prompt and streamed response on each claimed surface

constraints.description: Provide local relational/vector persistence through PGlite/pgvector equivalents and embedded SurrealDB graph memory, with ranked search and visible citation provenance.

validation.validation_method: seeded ranked-memory search and citation workflow

constraints.description: Flutter uses the same semantic tokens, Flat 2.0 treatment, responsive information architecture, rich blocks, and local-first runtime through Rust FFI.

validation.validation_method: goldens, analyze/test, simulator launch, and Rust-ready proof

constraints.description: The same binding fidelity/runtime skills and activation guidance are installed for Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Kimi, .agents-compatible, and generated projects.

validation.validation_method: six-directory parity/hash audit plus scratch scaffold

constraints.description: Meet WCAG 2.2 AA in both themes with keyboard, focus, live-region, screen-reader, reduced-motion, target-size, and text-scaling behavior.

validation.validation_method: axe, keyboard walk, contrast checks, and Flutter semantics inspection

global_rules: The accepted standalone design is the visual and interaction acceptance oracle.
The newer KnowMe Flat 2.0 standard supersedes borders and shadows in older mood-board mechanics.
A successful build or launch is not proof of a working product workflow.
Repair the responsible skill, template, scaffold, or audit whenever the reference app exposes a generated defect.
termination_conditions: All blocking constraints are satisfied with current evidence.
Every claimed surface has clean-checkout production build, real launch, persistence, and public-workflow proof.
The complete screenshot matrix has no unresolved blocking fidelity differences.
A newly scaffolded hybrid application inherits the corrected skills, architecture, and verification gates.
